evals.prompt: Find a cash-secured put on AAPL
evals.expected_output: Trade card with strike, premium, return on capital, effective buy price, discount, and probability of profit. Should use ~25 delta and 30-45 DTE by default. Should include a risk checklist.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a structured trade card showing the put to SELL

assertions.name: has_key_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes return on capital, effective buy price, discount percentage, and probability of profit

assertions.name: uses_default_25_delta
assertions.description: Response targets ~25 delta for the short put since none was specified

assertions.name: uses_30_45_dte
assertions.description: Response targets an expiry in the 30-45 DTE window

assertions.name: shows_cash_required
assertions.description: Response shows the cash required to secure the put (strike × 100)

assertions.name: has_risk_checklist
assertions.description: Response includes a risk signal checklist covering at least earnings and IV rank

evals.expected_output: CSP trade card targeting 20-delta instead of the default 25. Should acknowledge the delta override.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a structured trade card showing the put to SELL

assertions.name: respects_20_delta
assertions.description: Response explicitly uses 20-delta for the short put, not the default 25-delta

assertions.name: has_key_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes return on capital, effective buy price, and probability of profit

assertions.name: pop_near_80pct
assertions.description: Probability of profit is stated as approximately 80% (consistent with 1 - 0.20 delta)

assertions.name: shows_cash_required
assertions.description: Response shows the cash required to secure the put

evals.prompt: I want to buy NVDA at a discount, what put should I sell?
evals.expected_output: CSP recommendation framed around stock acquisition — effective buy price, discount from current price, and the two outcomes (keep premium vs get assigned).

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a structured trade card showing the put to SELL

assertions.name: frames_as_acquisition
assertions.description: Response frames the trade around acquiring NVDA at a discount, not just income generation

assertions.name: shows_effective_buy_price
assertions.description: Response shows the effective buy price if assigned (strike - premium)

assertions.name: shows_discount_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the discount percentage from current market price

assertions.name: describes_two_outcomes
assertions.description: Response describes both outcomes: keep premium if OTM, or acquire shares at discount if assigned

assertions.name: has_key_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes return on capital and cash required

evals.prompt: Set up a cash-secured put on TSLA, 6 weeks out.
evals.expected_output: CSP trade card for TSLA with earnings flag since Tesla reports ~April 28 2026 which falls near the 6-week window.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a structured trade card showing the put to SELL

assertions.name: flags_earnings_event
assertions.description: Response identifies the Tesla earnings event as a risk within or near the expiry window

assertions.name: has_key_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes return on capital, effective buy price, discount, and probability of profit

assertions.name: shows_cash_required
assertions.description: Response shows the large cash requirement for TSLA
